title: ClaudeJson (partial)
description: $CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR/.claude.json — Claude Code's own internal state file (~90 top-level keys as of v2.1.199: UI/onboarding caches, feature flags, usage counters, per-project settings). claude-box does not own this format and it evolves independently of this repo, so this schema deliberately does NOT pin most of it (additionalProperties: true throughout) — only the fields claude-box's authd/check-in/remote-serve wiring actually depends on are typed precisely: oauthAccount (org/subscription identity, read by `claude remote-control`'s eligibility check — see authd.ts's ClaudeCredentials.oauthAccount) and projects[path].hasTrustDialogAccepted (pre-seeded by claude-box.ts's --remote-serve boot script to skip the workspace-trust dialog).

userID.description: opaque per-install hash, not the account UUID

oauthAccount.description: Populated by `claude auth login` (and refreshed by `claude auth status`) — a separate profile/org lookup, NOT part of the OAuth token exchange in .credentials.json. Required for `claude remote-control`'s org-eligibility check; a box that only has a leased access token but never populated this fails with "Unable to determine your organization" even with valid credentials (confirmed live, 2026-07-04).
